title: phyllanthus comitus
intro: Phyllanthus comitus, also known as the common green garlic, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its small, green, and fragrant garlic-like flowers. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus comitus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
